allow: PowerShell($urls = @\('https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG130220253028_1800x1800.jpg?v=1739518304', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG130220253035_1800x1800.jpg?v=1739518313', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG130220253032_1800x1800.jpg?v=1739518313', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG130220253034_1800x1800.jpg?v=1739518313'\); $i=1; foreach \($url in $urls\) { $out = "images/polo-$i.jpg"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)"; $i++ })

PowerShell($urls = @\('https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG230720249213_1800x1800.jpg?v=1721809441', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG230720249216_1800x1800.jpg?v=1721809441', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG230720249218_1800x1800.jpg?v=1721809441'\); $i=1; foreach \($url in $urls\) { $out = "images/polo-black-$i.jpg"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)"; $i++ })

PowerShell($urls = @\('https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG1505265327_1800x1800.jpg?v=1779092680', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG1505265344_1800x1800.jpg?v=1779092680', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG1505265338_1800x1800.jpg?v=1779092680', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG1505265348_1800x1800.jpg?v=1779092680', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG1505265350_1800x1800.jpg?v=1779092680'\); $i=1; foreach \($url in $urls\) { $out = "images/puma-pants-$i.jpg"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)"; $i++ })

PowerShell($urls = @\('https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520897_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276197', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520899_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276197', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520898_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276197', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520900_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276192', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520901_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276192', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520902_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276192', 'https://www.edgars.co.za/cdn/shop/files/EDG2706202520903_1800x1800.jpg?v=1751276192'\); $i=1; foreach \($url in $urls\) { $out = "images/oakley-bag-$i.jpg"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)"; $i++ })

PowerShell(@\("accounts.zoho.com","mail.zoho.com","crm.zoho.com","people.zoho.com","zoho.in","zohopublic.com","zohocorp.com","zohocreator.com","zohobookings.com","zohoapis.com"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $ip = \(Resolve-DnsName $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Section -eq "Answer" -and $_.Type -eq "A"} | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress\); if \($ip\) { Write-Host "$_ -> $ip" } else { Write-Host "$_ -> UNRESOLVED" } } catch { Write-Host "$_ -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://accounts.zoho.com" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(\(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion"\).DisplayVersion; \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion"\).EditionID; \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion"\).InstallationType; \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion"\).BuildBranch; \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion"\).BuildLabEx; \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\WindowsUpdate\\OSUpdateInfo" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).BranchReadinessLevel)
PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "System" -MaxEvents 50 | Where-Object { $_.Level -eq 2 -or $_.Level -eq 1 } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, Message | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Security" -MaxEvents 50 | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 36880 -or $_.Id -eq 36881 -or $_.Id -eq 36882 } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, Message -First 10 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $UsoSession = [Activator]::CreateInstance\([Type]::GetTypeFromProgID\("Microsoft.Update.Session"\)\); $UsoSearcher = $UsoSession.CreateUpdateSearcher\(\); $UsoSearcher.Online = $true; $SearchResult = $UsoSearcher.Search\("IsInstalled=0 and Type='Software'"\); $SearchResult.Updates | Select-Object Title, Description, LastDeploymentChangeTime | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap } catch { Write-Output "Scan error: $_" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; try { $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $result = $wc.DownloadString\("https://accounts.zoho.com"\); Write-Output "Chrome/WebClient SUCCESS: received $\($result.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "WebClient error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler; $handler.SslProtocols = [System.Security.Authentication.SslProtocols]::Tls12; $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\); $result = $client.GetAsync\("https://accounts.zoho.com"\).Result; Write-Output "HttpClient SUCCESS: $\($result.StatusCode\)"; $result.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result.Length } catch { Write-Output "HttpClient error: $_" })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://accounts.zoho.com" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "IWR SUCCESS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "IWR error: $\($_.Exception.GetType\(\).Name\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Cryptography" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Property -contains "EccCurves" } | Select-Object PSPath; Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\SecurityProviders\\SCHANNEL" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Property -contains "EccCurves" } | Select-Object PSPath)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://uupdump.net/" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "UUP dump reachable: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "UUP dump not reachable via IE/WinINet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://uupdump.net/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "UUP dump: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "UUP dump FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "Checking if Chrome can help fetch build info..."; $chrome = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\App Paths\\chrome.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($chrome\) { $chromePath = $chrome."\(default\)"; Write-Output "Chrome found at: $chromePath" } else { Write-Output "Chrome registry path not found - trying ProgramFiles"; $chromePath = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; if \(Test-Path $chromePath\) { Write-Output "Chrome found at: $chromePath" } else { Write-Output "Chrome not found at default path" } })

PowerShell(try { $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Microsoft-Windows/10.0.26200.8655"\); $xml = $wc.DownloadString\("https://feeds.windowsupdate.com/microsoftupdate/iemain/26200?arch=amd64"\); Write-Output "WU feed: $\($xml.Length\) bytes"; $xml.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $xml.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "WU feed error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $api = Invoke-RestMethod "https://uupdump.net/api/v2/listid/26200" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Available builds:"; $api.response.builds | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.title\) - Build $\($_.build\) \($\($_.updated\)\)" } } catch { Write-Output "API error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://uupdump.net/api/v2/listbuilds" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Builds found: $\($r.response.builds.Count\)"; $r.response.builds | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.title\) \(build $\($_.build\), arch $\($_.arch\)\)" } } catch { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.uupdump.net/listbuilds.php" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Builds found: $\($r.Count\)"; $r | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.title\) \($\($_.build\)\)" } } catch { "API error: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://curl.se/windows/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "curl.se: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "curl.se FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(python -c "import urllib.request; r = urllib.request.urlopen\('https://accounts.zoho.com', timeout=10\); print\(f'SUCCESS: {r.status} - {len\(r.read\(\)\)} bytes'\)" 2>&1)
